articles.title: Trump Says Iran’s Concessions Pave Way for Deal to End War
articles.summary: President Donald Trump claimed Iran has made key concessions in negotiations with the US and that a deal to end the war — which has left thousands dead and rattled energy markets — could be announced “fairly soon.”

articles.summary: Workspace Group Plc has warned investors it faces a “substantial” profit squeeze due to higher costs and lower rents that will force the London-based flexible office landlord to cut its dividend.

articles.summary:
Trump says Israel and Lebanon agreed to a 10-day ceasefire. Netanyahu confirmed the truce as a step toward broader peace, with US officials working on a lasting deal.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Uber Raises Delivery Hero Stake in €270 Million Prosus Deal
articles.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is raising its holding in Delivery Hero SE, buying a stake from its European rival’s biggest shareholder for €270 million ($318 million).

articles.title: Global Banks Scramble for Land in Mumbai
articles.summary:
Mumbai’s skyline is changing as Wall Street firms pile in to tap India’s financial boom. But in a land-starved city, that growth is colliding with communities and intensifying the fight for space.

 (Source: Bloomberg)
